text: Amazing staff ! They love what they do and they try their best on achieving the results we aim for ! I totally recommend this place .
author: Heleen Butrus

text: Eyebrow tattoo removal is definitely not for the weak. However, Cindy made the process well worth it. While I’ll likely need another session there’s a huge difference in my brows and I’m very pleased with results.
author: Kayli Breann

text: I had a great experience at Removery! Cindy was really nice, fast, and checked on me the entire time to make sure I was comfortable. The process was smooth, and the staff was friendly and professional. I really appreciate the care and attention highly recommend!
author: Mirna Portillo

text: I really appreciate the professionalism of the staff lizet and Cindy are the best thank you so much guys
author: Jorge Dominguez

text: I love the experience here. All the consultants make sure you’re comfortable and confident. Great energy from both the front desk as well as the nurses. I can’t wait to get this removal done. I just completed my first session and it wasn’t as bad as it seems! I would definitely recommend coming here not just for the great customer service but also because their knowledge based on this procedure is outstanding. I feel more confident coming to Removery because they specialize in tattoo removal rather than a Med Spa who could do tattoo removal, injectables, laser hair removal, etc. Lizet and Cindy happily accommodated to my busy schedule and fit me in when needed. Don’t even hesitate like I did coming here. I wish I knew about them sooner.
author: Mia Manoukian

text: Lizet and Cindy greeted me warmly and then were even kinder as I emotionally felt apart. They were professional and helpful while still showing such humanity. I bought a package and had my first treatment before leaving. I highly recommend Removery, especially the Woodland Hills location!
author: Nicole J Weinberg

text: Cindy is an absolute dream. She is so  attentive  and caring. I’m so grateful for her and removery!.
author: Samantha ortiz

text: I went in for a consultation feeling pretty nervous and unsure about the process. However, the team at Removery was fantastic! The friendly, personable staff immediately put my worries at ease and made the dread of removal feel completely bearable. I felt so comfortable that I actually started my first session right after the consultation, thankfully they had time for me. Highly recommend them if you're looking for a professional and supportive team!
author: Ariana Flores

text: I love this place I always get me in and out quick and they take good care of me even when I’m scared of the laser😂😂😅
author: Matthew Cammarano

text: Awesome team! They take great care of you and are very thorough in the process. Highly recommend!
author: Taren Bernardini

text: I highly recommend this place 10/10 . From the very first moment I walked in to get information Lizet was very professional and polite,  she gave me all the information i needed, she made me feel  very comfortable and was not judgmental at all of this horrible tattoo I have on my ankle lol. The nurse is also very professional  and very humble. I really love this place I’m so glad I’m getting my tattoo removal at this location. So happy . THANK YOU SO MUCH.
author: Juliet montoya

text:
From start to finish, the service has been absolutely excellent. My tattoo removal journey has felt smooth, supportive, and professional every step of the way. Lizet and Cindy are truly wonderful — friendly, knowledgeable, and attentive throughout the entire process. They always make me feel comfortable, explain what to expect, and check in to make sure I’m healing well after each session.
I’m so happy with my experience and the progress I’ve seen so far. I highly recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal!
author: Jeanette A

text: Cindy and Lizet were amazing, I went in for a quote and I got out with my first session I’m so excited and thankful I found them they made me feel like family  I highly recommend them for  anyone looking for tattoo removal to go to Cindy and Lizet they make a difficult process go so smooth thank you girls
author: Blanca Gonzalez

text: I’m a tattoo artist, I recommend them to my clients and I go there myself. I do very delicate fineline work and a lot of my clients come to me hoping that I can fix a tattoo that turned out  darker or bolder than what they wanted. The only way for me to give them what they want is to go through the laser removal first. Their equipment is top of line and operated by knowledgeable professionals, I go to the woodland hills store and I have to say the staff is incredible. They will give you all information you need and u will go home with all ur aftercare. I’d give 6 stars if I could
author: Isabela Valotti

text:
I had an amazing experience with Lizet and Cindy during my tattoo removal process. From the very beginning, they were extremely professional, knowledgeable, and thorough in explaining every step of the procedure. They made sure I understood how the process works, what to expect during each session, aftercare instructions, and realistic timelines for results.

They answered all of my questions patiently and made me feel completely comfortable and confident in moving forward. The environment was clean, welcoming, and well-organized, which made the experience even better.

Tattoo removal can feel intimidating, but Lizet and Cindy truly made it smooth and reassuring. I highly recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal — you’ll be in professional, caring hands.
author: Diana Mkrtchyan

text: Crew was really nice and welcoming and polite very friendly and friendly
author: Butch Moreno

text: Removery is awesome!! The staff is super knowledgeable and professional!!
author: Christine Gilleran

text: Had such a pleasant consult and first session! All the ladies were very welcoming and friendly and resonated with me. Lizet signed me up, Cindy did the removals. They really made this experience the best it could be.
author: Gaby

text: I had such a wonderful experience at Removery in Woodland Hills and I cannot recommend it enough if you’re considering tattoo removal. I first met with Lizet who was so friendly and informative and right away made me feel comfortable and excited about the process. Cindy was the nurse who did the treatment for me and she is absolutely lovely and professional and made me feel so at ease and comfortable the whole time. Looking forward to my next visit!
author: Louise Simmrin

text: Best place
author: BD Garage Door Gill

text: Great experience with Removery! I’ve been wanting to get a couple tattoos removed for several years and am happy to start that process here. Went in for a consultation and started removal the same day since their unlimited sessions aren’t capped at a certain number. Lizet was friendly and honest explaining everything in detail, from how the procedure works to payment plans and financing, estimated amount of sessions, and showed me before and after photos as well as sharing her own experience. Cindy was kind, reassuring, and calming. The session was quick and hurt less than getting the tattoos.
author: Isabel Miller

text: Came in for a consultation Lizet helped me out fast and efficiently she was so nice and welcoming will definitely be back
author: Austin Jackson

text:
Life-Changing results for Old Tattoos ( Eyebrows & Back)
After years of covering up, I decided to remove my tattoos , I chose Removery, and I’m glad I did! From the consultation they were honest and clear about the process for two different areas. The technology they use is top-notch. Cindy was incredibly careful and gentle.The back sessions were more intense due to size and ink age. But she made as comfortable as possible. The results have exceeded all my expectations.My back & my eyebrows have faded almost completely. I couldn’t be happier.100% recommend!
author: The Real Sunshine

text: They’re always very professional and they always make sure that the process runs very smoothly.
author: Alex Luján

text:
version:

This is my second time coming to this center to remove my tattoo.
They did the procedure very quickly and used ice to numb my skin, which made it much more comfortable.
Every time I asked them to pause, they patiently stopped and continued calmly.
I highly recommend this place.
If you want to remove your tattoo without the risk of burning your skin, scarring, or leaving marks, this is definitely the place to go.
author: Bahar Ix

text: Removery is always a clean establishment. The staff at Woodland Hills is always friendly, nice and informative. Currently removing 3 tattoos and even had my eyebrow Microbalding removed and love the results.
author: E F

text: Lizet is the BEST around! incredible service, I can’t wait for my appointment.
author: Jenna

text:
Awesome place.
They did a test spot before i  paid and it turned out it didn’t work for me. Super appreciate their ethical policies
author: Kristianna Lee

text: Lizet is a superstar when it comes to customer service!  She needs either a bonus or a promotion ASAP for taking care of anyone who walks into the Woodland Hills location
author: TBLume

text: Amazing women, they’re so understanding and amazing at what they do! 1000/10
author: Hanna T

text: There employees are very nice very considerate of what you want and your needs they are by far the best service I have ever had in these removal shops I ever been to
author: Anthony Wallace

text: I had the BEST first experience at Removery today. Lizet was super helpful, informative & personable. She made me feel very comfortable from beginning to end and prepared me for what to expect. Cindy was the nurse that performed my first session and she was super sweet and also made me feel incredibly comfortable. I feel great and can’t wait for my next session!
author: Wendy Castellanos

text: The staff is SO nice and helpful and the results are great. Only downside is I feel like a hotdog on a hotdog roller when I’m in the lobby. It’s so hot definitely recommend they get some blinds. Other than that 10/10 experience
author: Zach F

text: My consultation was quick and swift. The process is so easy and fast. Lizet was a great help and she’s so nice. Great experience, can’t wait to complete the tattoo removal process.
author: Kamara
